features: BRIGHTEN & EVEN SKIN TONE: Achieve a radiant, even complexion with our 12% niacinamide serum. This powerhouse ingredient helps reduce the look of dark spots and uneven tone while improving skin clarity for a natural glow.

REFINE PORES & BALANCE OIL: Formulated with niacinamide and zinc, this serum for face helps minimize enlarged pores and controls excess oil. The lightweight texture absorbs quickly, leaving skin smoother and more refined without a greasy feel.

HYDRATION BOOST WITH SOOTHING CARE: Featuring hyaluronic acid, chamomile, and glycerin, this face serum deeply hydrates and calms skin while reinforcing the moisture barrier. Enjoy softer, plumper, and more nourished skin with every use.

POWERFUL ANTIOXIDANTS FOR HEALTHY SKIN: Infused with green tea, licorice root, and rosemary extract, our niacinamide face serum delivers an antioxidant-rich formula helping maintain your skin’s moisture and support a healthier, youthful look.
SKINCARE FOR ALL: Made with natural ingredients, our formula is vegan, cruelty-free, and fragrance-free. Designed for all skin types, this facial serum is a great addition to your skin care routine.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Does it feel sticky or oily? No, this serum is lightweight and non-greasy, and it absorbs easily into the skin without stickiness. Is this suitable for oily/acne-prone skin? Our Niacinamide serum has been dermatologically tested and is suitable for all skin types. I received this product and it has a ‘lot number’ on the packaging. Is this the expiry date? No, the LOT number is a reference to the unique batch of your product unit used internally. It isn’t an expiry date. Please check the open jar symbol on the packaging, which indicates the recommended usage period after opening. Radiant Skin Starts Here With a blend of clarifying niacinamide and moisture-retaining sodium hyaluronate, our serum refines skin while reducing the appearance of wrinkles, dullness, and hyperpigmentation. product_details_tab_data.Active Ingredients: SUPERCHARGE BRIGHTENERS + HERO HYDRATORS: Potent niacinamide works to reduce dark spots and minimize the appearance of pores, while green tea and licorice root boost brightness further. Hyaluronic acid, glycerin, and chamomile boost hydration while soothing the skin barrier.
product_details_tab_data.Special Ingredients: SUPERCHARGE BRIGHTENERS + HERO HYDRATORS: Dermatologist-endorsed niacinamide (reduces dark spots, hyperpigmentation, melasma, and enlarged pores) green tea, skullcap and licorice root (brighten skin and boost antioxidant protection), hyaluronic acid and glycerin (hydrate and smooth wrinkles), chamomile (calms).
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: DERMATOLOGST TESTED* ON ALL SKIN TYPES & TONES: Our radiance-boosting niacinamide serum is designed to be kind on all skin types. We harness the power of natural, vegan or vegetarian ingredients. This dark spot-fading formula is intended for external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid direct contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water and seek medical assistance if irritation persists. For users with sensitive skin, a patch test is advised before use. *Dermatest, 04/2026
